note: Representative draft tasks scored on the proven run-drafter-eval battery: reader-facing PROPERTIES, not a payload schema (the drafter prompt leaves the payload an open object, so field names legitimately vary). Email actions guarantee to/subject/body and echo the recipient; open-payload action types (calendar, supply, digest) only require non-empty reader-facing text. All arms additionally: no placeholder tokens, body within bound, no ungrounded specifics (a fabricated email/$/long-digit must appear in the input).

payload.subject: Confirm visit
payload.body: We have an opening for Mira's 18-month visit Tuesday June 23 at 5:30 PM. Can you confirm?

payload.subject: Your application
payload.body: A spot has opened for Mira in our toddler room starting September. Please reply by Friday to accept.

payload.subject: Follow-up question
payload.body: Just checking — did Mira's cough improve after the weekend? Let us know if you'd like to book a visit.

payload.subject: EI maternity benefits
payload.body: Your claim has been processed. First payment within 3 business days.
